headline: Eaton (ETN) Is Down 7.8% After Raising 2026 Guidance Amid Margin Pressure and AI Bet
summary: Eaton Corporation plc recently reported past first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$7,451 million from US$6,377 million a year earlier, while net income eased to US$866 million and diluted EPS from continuing operations slipped to US$2.22 from US$2.45. Alongside closing about US$11.00 billion of acquisitions and highlighting surging AI data center demand, Eaton raised its 2026 organic growth and adjusted EPS guidance, underlining management’s confidence in its power management...
